Backend.description: Gateway selector for one exact backend id.
Backend.name: backend

Cluster.description: Gateway selector. Use a concrete cluster for writes, admission, queries, and SSE; omit or use all for fan-out GET endpoints.
Cluster.name: cluster

Limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.
Limit.name: limit

info.description: Admission control, prefix-cache residency, KV-event observability, and configuration API.
info.title: ucloud-kv-indexer API

post.description: Creates or replaces a cluster config.

maintenance_mode.description: Whether the cluster is in maintenance mode.
Whether the cluster is in maintenance mode.

get.description: Lists configuration mutations and profile version bumps.

post.description: Evaluates the priority-ordered rule list for a request shape. Rule conditions are AND clauses; rules are OR by priority.

fresh.description: Whether KV event signals are trusted for this preview. Defaults true.

has_candidates.description: Whether at least one engine can serve the request. Defaults true.

hash_supported.description: Whether the request features are hash-supported. Defaults true.

hit_ratio.description: Synthetic KV hit ratio for previewing require_cache_hit actions.

input_tokens.description: Input token count to test against token-count conditions.

tokenized.description: Whether tokenization succeeded for this preview. Defaults true.

get.description: Returns the current config version. On gateway, returns one item per backend.
Returns recent admission verdicts with reason, hit ratio, target, and config version.

post.description: Registers or replaces an inference engine and starts its KV-event listener if configured.

draining.description: Whether this engine should stop receiving new work.

framework.description: Serving framework, for example vllm or sglang.

kv_event_endpoint.description: ZMQ KV-event endpoint for prefix-cache awareness.

served_models.description: Model ids served by this engine.

tokenizer_endpoint.description: Tokenizer endpoint. Defaults to api_endpoint when omitted.

patch.description: Hot-updates mutable engine state such as enabled, draining, health, and queue depth.

draining.description: Whether this engine should stop receiving new work.

get.description: Per-engine ZMQ listener connection, sequence, gap, decode, and queue health.
Liveness endpoint. It is not authenticated on kvindexer.
Lists request_key, bridge, engine, and last-event counts per namespace.
Returns recent decoded ZMQ KV-cache events. Query parameter limit defaults to 100.
Server-Sent Events stream of decoded KV-cache events. Select exactly one backend or cluster through the gateway.

post.description: Creates a new profile version when hash-affecting fields change.

chat_template.description: Optional chat_template override when registering a local tokenizer.

chat_template_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the active local chat_template.

tokenizer_mode.description: Tokenizer source: remote (engine endpoint) or local (gateway sidecar).

post.description: Creates or replaces a policy rule.

min_hit_ratio.description: Required KV hit ratio when type=require_cache_hit. 0.5 means 50%.

on_low_hit.description: Outcome when cache hit ratio is below min_hit_ratio.

on_uncertain.description: Outcome when tokenization/hash/events/candidate signal is unavailable.

reject_status.description: HTTP status used for reject outcomes. Defaults to 429.

action.description: Action to execute when all conditions match.

conditions.description: AND conditions. Empty means match every request.

value.description: Comparison value. For in/not_in, pass an array.

enabled.description: Whether this rule is enabled. Omitted means enabled.

priority.description: Higher priority rules are evaluated first.

patch.description: Updates selected fields on a policy rule.

min_hit_ratio.description: Required KV hit ratio when type=require_cache_hit. 0.5 means 50%.

on_low_hit.description: Outcome when cache hit ratio is below min_hit_ratio.

on_uncertain.description: Outcome when tokenization/hash/events/candidate signal is unavailable.

reject_status.description: HTTP status used for reject outcomes. Defaults to 429.

action.description: Action to execute when all conditions match.

conditions.description: AND conditions. Empty means match every request.

value.description: Comparison value. For in/not_in, pass an array.

enabled.description: Whether this rule is enabled. Omitted means enabled.

priority.description: Higher priority rules are evaluated first.

post.description: Mooncake/Dynamo-style per-instance prefix hit query. Accepts model plus token_ids, or model plus prompt.

block_size.description: Optional override for profile block size.

model.description: Model name used to resolve profile/namespace.

prompt.description: Plain prompt to tokenize when token_ids are not provided.

token_ids.description: Token ids to query. If omitted, prompt is tokenized by the engine.

max_tokens.description: Optional generation limit; accepted for compatibility.

temperature.description: Optional sampling temperature; accepted for compatibility.

tenant_id.description: Optional business tenant/customer/workspace id used for policy matching.

post.description: Shows normalized tokens and request_keys for a protocol request.

protocol.description: Protocol id: openai.chat, openai.responses, or anthropic.messages.

post.description: Normalizes and tokenizes an OpenAI chat request, queries prefix residency, and applies policy. It judges; it does not proxy generation.

max_tokens.description: Optional generation limit; accepted for compatibility.

temperature.description: Optional sampling temperature; accepted for compatibility.

tenant_id.description: Optional business tenant/customer/workspace id used for policy matching.

post.description: Admission judgment for Anthropic Messages-compatible requests.

tenant_id.description: Optional business tenant/customer/workspace id used for policy matching.

post.description: Admission judgment for OpenAI Responses-compatible requests.

input.description: Responses API input. Object/array inputs are accepted by compatible clients but omitted from this compact schema.

tenant_id.description: Optional business tenant/customer/workspace id used for policy matching.
